articles.title: Boston firefighter, National Guard member reportedly injured in strike that killed 6 U.S. soldiers
articles.description:
The fatal Iranian drone strike happened in Kuwait, where the six U.S. soldiers who were killed were stationed.

The post Boston firefighter, National Guard member reportedly injured in strike that killed 6 U.S. soldiers appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Iranian drone strike in Kuwait killed six U.S. soldiers, including a Boston firefighter.
Boston firefighter and National Guard member injured; details on condition remain unclear.
Local community rallies to support families affected by the tragedy and injured service members.

articles.title: Lowell murder trial delayed after lead State Police investigator allegedly causes fatal crash while driving drunk
articles.description:
A State Police sergeant in charge of investigating the 2020 murder remains embroiled in allegations following a 2023 crash.

The post Lowell murder trial delayed after lead State Police investigator allegedly causes fatal crash while driving drunk appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lowell murder trial postponed due to State Police sergeant's alleged drunk driving crash.
Sgt. involved was the lead investigator in a 2020 murder case.
Trial delay raises concerns over justice for victims and community safety.

articles.title: ​Bruins’ playoff hopes might rest on Jeremy Swayman’s shoulders for this stretch run
articles.description:
"He's a winner. He shows it every time he's out there."

The post ​Bruins’ playoff hopes might rest on Jeremy Swayman’s shoulders for this stretch run appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jeremy Swayman is crucial for Bruins' playoff success this season.
Swayman has consistently performed well, showcasing his winning mentality.
Boston residents are hopeful his performance will secure a playoff spot.

articles.title: Watch: Body cam shows Patriots party at downtown Boston restaurant
articles.description:
“Do you know who’s in the room? You have all the f—ing Patriots here, and this is their private party," one reveler told police.

The post Watch: Body cam shows Patriots party at downtown Boston restaurant appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots held a private party at a downtown Boston restaurant on March 11.
Body cam footage revealed the excitement of attendees, including multiple team members.
Local businesses may benefit from increased visibility and tourism due to the event.

articles.title: 4 things to know about new Patriots safety Kevin Byard
articles.description:
Kevin Byard has recorded 36 interceptions over his 10-year NFL career.

The post 4 things to know about new Patriots safety Kevin Byard appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kevin Byard joins the Patriots as a new safety, enhancing the team's defense.
Byard has 36 career interceptions over 10 NFL seasons, showcasing his experience.
His addition aims to improve Boston's chances for a successful season.

articles.title: Man resentenced in 2011 slaying of Dorchester teen
articles.description:
Nyasani Watt is sentenced to 14-17 years in prison but due to credited time is immediately eligible for parole, the local DA said.

The post Man resentenced in 2011 slaying of Dorchester teen appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Nyasani Watt resentenced to 14-17 years for 2011 Dorchester teen's murder.
Watt is immediately eligible for parole due to credited time served.
Local DA emphasizes the ongoing impact of violence on Boston communities.
